URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login 21:07:37 [main] INFO com.ekart.base.BaseTest - Cookies BEFORE logout: (no cookies) 21:07:37 [main] INFO com.ekart.pages.BasePage - Attempting logout… 21:07:48 [main] WARN com.ekart.pages.BasePage - → User avatar not found — may already be on logout trigger or using inline nav 21:07:58 [main] ERROR com.ekart.pages.BasePage - → Logout menu item NOT found 21:07:59 [main] INFO com.ekart.base.BaseTest - Cookies AFTER logout: (no cookies) 21:07:59 [main] INFO com.ekart.pages.BasePage - No auth cookies found — session cookies cleared 21:07:59 [main] INFO com.ekart.base.BaseTest - PASS TC_LOGOUT_003: Auth cookies cleared

testcase.name: testLocalStorageTokensClearedAfterLogout

failure.message: Auth tokens should be removed from localStorage after logout expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testSessionDoesNotPersistAfterLogout

testcase.name: testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh

failure.message: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.name: testBackButtonAfterLogoutDoesNotRestoreSession

Cookies clear: true

testcase.name: testFullLoginLogoutLoginCycle

failure.message: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should be past /login after first login.
